core.name: Core Brain
core.quote: The direction holds. We're just drawing new paths.

self.name: Self Brain
self.quote: I've bumped into this before. Follow me.

field.name: Field Brain
field.quote: We assemble it here. Let's go.

engram.name: Engram
engram.quote: This memory — where should I file it?

signal.name: Signal Sorter
signal.quote: This one's signal. That one's noise. Pass!

mirror.name: Mirror Neuron
mirror.quote: I'm echoing back. I'm echoing back.

trinity.name: Trinity Guide
trinity.quote: Health, app, brain, finance. All four corners watched.

audit.name: Audit Companion
audit.quote: Take your time. I'm right here with you.
